title: Sun Zhenwei
content:
He was the son of the the grey robed man of the 
Cloud Sky Sect
. He was very ambitious and lusted over 
Li Muwan
, both for her looks and as a dual cultivation dao partner. He was arranged to be married to her in the 
Cloud Sky Sect
. He was scared when he met Wang Lin for the first time when he appeared in front of him and Li Muwan. He desired to reach Nascent Soul and wanted to mistreat Li Muwan for refusing the marriage proposal when he came to know Wang Lin was the one in her heart (that is why she refused him several times in 200 years). He was eventually killed on his dao ceremony day (also day of his wedding with Li Muwan) by Wang Lin who had just reached Nascent Soul on that day with Li Muwan's help.
